ohtani.title: Ohtani's homer, four Ks propel Dodgers to 4-0 win
ohtani.blurb: A gem by Shohei Ohtani, both at the plate with a home run, and on the mound secures a 4-0 shutout victory for the Dodgers over the Padres

imanaga.title: Yelich, Bauers combine for six RBI's in Brewers' win
imanaga.blurb: Christian Yelich and Jake Bauers each homer and combine for six RBI's, powering the Brewers to a 9-3 win

suzuki.title: Kyle Harrison dominates in Brewers' shutout win
suzuki.blurb: Kyle Harrison tosses seven scoreless innings and strikes out 11 in the Brewers' shutout win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Jarren Duran hits go-ahead homer in Red Sox 4-3 win
yoshida.blurb: Jarren Duran delivers a go-ahead homer and Connelly Early strikes out five in the Red Sox 4-3 win over the Royals

okamoto.title: Trey Yesavage is lights out in Blue Jays' 2-1 win
okamoto.blurb: Trey Yesavage wins the pitcher's duel vs. Cam Schlittler, striking out eight batters and allowing no runs over seven innings in the Blue Jays' 2-1 win over the Yankees

murakami.title: Pereda, Arozarena's home runs power Mariners' win
murakami.blurb: Jhonny Pereda and Randy Arozarena hit home runs in the bottom of the 7th to propel the Mariners to a 5-4 win over the White Sox

matsui.title: Ohtani's homer, four Ks propel Dodgers to 4-0 win
matsui.blurb: A gem by Shohei Ohtani, both at the plate with a home run, and on the mound secures a 4-0 shutout victory for the Dodgers over the Padres
